purgeList.reason: Pins exact kwargs dicts, cell ordering, and r2-gate of the historical 8-cell alias-fix sweep (jaunty-weaving-mist Phase C campaign). Constant==literal tautologies preserving a finished experiment's configuration; measures no accuracy. Experiment archaeology.
Meta-test asserting a stale @xfail marker string still exists in another test file's source; self-described as delete-when-fixed housekeeping for bead 359q. Pure archaeology, protects nothing.

Pure back-compat shim suite: legacy flat-path names must resolve after the bayesian.py->package split. With zero users no back-compat is owed; test_flat_and_package_paths_agree imports the same module twice and asserts identity (tautological). Any real consumer test covers the imports that matter. PURGE.

Entirely back-compat surface pins: alias identity (NumPyroNUTSSampler is MCMCSampler), legacy run() keyword-set preservation, Protocol duck-typing tautologies, frozen-dataclass shape. No assertion failing here would ever mean identification/composition accuracy or runtime got worse — only that the API was renamed.

Pins tuned fitter defaults as exact values (outlier_sigma==2.5, max_iterations==10, huber_epsilon==1.2); remaining asserts are constructor-assignment tautologies and weak smoke already covered by test_boltzmann.py.
Pins tuned Tier-2 detection thresholds (Mn/Na/K) and exact CombIdentifier defaults (0.12, 2.0) on contrived inputs. Whether these thresholds help F1 is a benchmark question, not a unit invariant.

Pins the capped-denominator scoring formula (score 2/10 vs old 2/50) under hand-tuned parameters; explicit old-vs-new behavior archaeology. A benchmark-better scoring change would fail it without any recall regression.
process_spectrum is an explicit placeholder; tests pin its hardcoded dummy plasma parameters (T==12000 K, ne==1e17) — asserting a stub returns its stub values. Nothing goal- or physics-protecting.

AST lint enforcing that only a hardcoded carve-out list may use literal 'try: import jax' and kernels.py must not import host.py. Pure architectural-conformance pin (ADR-0001/T1-1 archaeology); failing never indicates the goal got worse.

Asserts kernels.py module layout exists per ADR and that host modules re-export private kernel symbols 'for back-compat with existing callers'. Module-layout and shim re-export pins; no physics or goal protection.

Enforces an 800-LOC-per-file ceiling on bayesian/*.py (ADR/spec acceptance criterion). Pure code-organization policing; failing can never indicate identification/composition accuracy or runtime got worse.

Empty tombstone: docstring-only module documenting that the legacy CDSBPlotter tests were removed with the class; coverage now lives in test_self_absorption.py. Zero assertions, pure deleted-feature remnant — delete the file.

all.reason: Sweep-script wiring tests with stubs: round-robin allocation (yfbg compute-waste regression) and bandit posterior plumbing catch real breakage. The named test is a 'T1.1 byte-shape' legacy-output pin (manifest must be field-identical to pre-bandit format when --bandit 0).

Mathematical/statistical correctness vs analytic oracle: known true arm means, >=70% allocation, sub-linear regret, bootstrap-CI shrinkage, determinism, NaN/Inf rejection. Failing means the allocator math is wrong, which wastes benchmark compute.

Registry wiring plus test_high_recall_configs_omit_threshold_kwargs (guards silent preset override that would collapse recall mode to strict) are keepers. The pinned test asserts tuned thresholds 3.0/0.02 as exact values — benchmark gating, not this pin, is the real protection.

Pins exact kwargs dicts, cell ordering, and r2-gate of the historical 8-cell alias-fix sweep (jaunty-weaving-mist Phase C campaign). Constant==literal tautologies preserving a finished experiment's configuration; measures no accuracy. Experiment archaeology.

test_bayesian_predictor_caching protects benchmark runtime (sampler cache across spectra) — keep. The pinned test is mock-call assertions plus an inspect.signature pin of MCMCSampler.run default chain_method=='vectorized' — pins how code is configured, not what must be true.
Shard partition is a disjoint cover (corrupted/overlapping shards would silently corrupt benchmark results), CLI parser bounds, parquet aggregator fail-fast on overlap. Cheap, catches real breakage.

Workflow registry exposure, end-to-end prediction shape, honest RuntimeError without jax/numpyro (vs silent CPU fallback), record field parity. Harness plumbing that catches real breakage of the benchmark gate.
Meta-test asserting a stale @xfail marker string still exists in another test file's source; self-described as delete-when-fixed housekeeping for bead 359q. Pure archaeology, protects nothing.

NIST SRM 1261a-1265a certified compositions as external truth: Fe-balance closure to 100 wt%, mass fractions sum to 1, certified-vs-information-value Fe cross-check, uncertainty table completeness. Plus cheap adapter I/O checks.
McWhirter LTE floor formula, Cristoforetti 2010 criterion (0.15), temperature physicality bounds, closure conservation, and block/alarm aggregation honesty — the Tier-1 physical trust gate.

Bidirectional posterior-calibration gates against constructed ground truth: coverage band, R-hat, ESS, divergent transitions, PIT. Trust-surface for Bayesian uncertainty honesty — directly protects result trustworthiness.

BHVO-2/SRM-612 loaders: certified compositions propagate to every spectrum, finite arrays, graceful None pre-ingest, registry aggregation, unknown-id ValueError. Cheap I/O correctness for benchmark ground truth.

Parquet round-trip preserving all record fields, NaN preservation, append/shard concatenation, DuckDB query correctness and speed budget, checkpoint restart safety. Results-pipeline I/O that catches real breakage.

Validates the robustness battery measures the right thing: robust estimator beats L2 under outlier injection (metric direction), identity perturbation gives zero delta-d_A, deterministic dropout/injection, thresholds match protocol. Protects validity of robustness measurements.

Majors/minors/traces accuracy gates (5%/20% RD per validation protocol), LOQ handling, and the 'majors win must not mask trace regression' trust-surface. Directly defines composition-accuracy pass/fail.

Mathematical properties of the log-ratio composition metric: zero for identical compositions, scale invariance, closure-distortion invariance, NaN/inf handling, biased-element detection. Metric correctness underpinning all composition-accuracy scoring.

Stoichiometric oxide-to-element factors against chemical truth (Si/SiO2=0.4674, Fe/Fe2O3=0.6994), certified USGS standard compositions summing to ~100 wt%, uncertainty scaling, basalt-to-granite Si ordering. Plus cheap adapter I/O.

Composition-recovery accuracy on analytic synthetic oracles: 50/50 binary, 70/30 brass-like, ternary closure, mixed neutral+ionic Saha correction, all with convergence asserted. Directly measures solver composition accuracy.

Pins: signature-default pins and the analyze==invert byte-identical entry-point drift pin, structurally redundant since bead l4a8 unified _run_pipeline. Keeper: test_default_path_admits_no_na_rydberg_lines — real BHVO-2 suppression of the Na false matches behind the Na~98% blowup (identification accuracy).

Pins: exact tuned-default/preset-content pins including 'raw preset == legacy'. Keepers: flag>YAML>preset precedence semantics, YAML typo hard-error (silent default reversion trust bug), batch==analyze config parity, shipped example-config safety, ResidualScanGlue calibration-fallback wiring.

Keepers: flag/YAML precedence, response-division math vs np.interp, coverage hard-error, config-relative path resolution. The pinned test asserts the identical array object (no copy) reaches detection — explicit bit-identity-to-pre-hook pin; a value-equality assert would suffice.

jit/vmap graceful fallbacks, x64 enforcement (numerical-precision trust), AtomicSnapshot mirrors SQLite transitions at rtol 1e-12 (data integrity into the JAX path), pytree registration enabling vmap. Infrastructure correctness that catches real breakage.
Enforces the project's hard physics-only constraint on evolved candidates, including adversarial aliases/nested imports. Cheap and guards a stated hard constraint.
Exit codes, stderr content, stdin handling, syntax-error-as-violation for the blocklist CLI. Cheap real-breakage coverage of constraint tooling.
EvolutionDriverConfig validation, frozen/immutable semantics, copied user dicts, invalid-value rejection. Generic config-correctness tests that cost nothing.

Keepers: preamble stays in sync with FORBIDDEN_PREFIXES/ALLOWED_PRIMITIVES (real drift catch). Pins: exact-phrase wording asserts ('HARD CONSTRAINT', 'fitness = -inf', 'NEVER') that fail on any rewording with zero goal impact.

InstrumentModelJax numerical equivalence to the reference numpy model (sigma in fixed-FWHM and resolving-power modes, response application) at rtol 1e-5. Divergence means the JAX forward model computes different physics.

Stark-broadened wavelength tolerance: protocol quadrature formula, analytic linear n_e scaling of Stark FWHM, Konjević reference defaults, exact consistency with radiation/stark.py single source of truth. Regression for a typo that zeroed Stark widths.

Overwhelmingly physics-truth: exact noiseless T round-trip, JAX-vs-linregress parity to 1e-5/machine precision, identical inf/NaN sentinel control flow, degenerate-input handling. The pinned test is a tautological 'constructor stores the flag' assert.

Overwhelmingly physics-truth: JAX NNLS/sparse-NNLS/attribution/template/P_SNR numerical parity to documented tolerances vs scipy references, plus end-to-end identical element detection CPU-vs-JAX. The pinned tests are tautological flag-storage/default-flag asserts.

Pins: exact tuned-cocktail contents of each ALIAS preset (registry table pins, only fail on deliberate retuning). Keepers: alias_preset round-trip (registry kwargs actually reach the constructor — silent misapplication would invisibly change identification), KeyError fail-fast, override-merge semantics.

Recall-non-decreasing-with-candidate-count tests on real BHVO-2 are goal-metric (would have caught PR #216). The pinned test asserts the LEGACY fraction-of-sum metadata still shrinks (#216 bug archaeology); fails if that legacy metadata is removed, even though goal unaffected. The gate decision-boundary test protects a known FP/TP split, keep.

Kernel cross-checked against scipy.stats.pearsonr (external math oracle); CPU/JAX are both live shipping backends, so end-to-end parity protects identification-score correctness, not legacy archaeology. ImportError test is cheap utility.

Adaptive-tolerance FP-reduction test is goal-metric (fewer wrong-element matches on Fe-only synthetic). The pinned test demands byte-identical legacy 0.1/0.2 defaults 'for existing callers' — pure back-compat contract with zero users. Explicit-override test is a harmless config contract.

Fused JAX kernel vs scipy pearsonr reference on the (T,n_e) correlation grid; both backends ship, so divergence would silently change identification scores. Degenerate-input and end-to-end parity protect active correctness.

All expected values are independent analytic oracles (Gaussian area h*FWHM*sqrt(pi/4ln2), hand-computed trapezoid/FWHM interpolation); protects units consistency of the Boltzmann ordinate. Exemplary physics test.

Cheap NumPy/JAX kernel-equivalence and edge-case tests for live opt-in flags (searchsorted tolerance, kdet counts, peak fallback) plus public-API parity. Both paths ship for the optional-JAX matrix; divergence is real breakage. Costs nothing.

On the real BHVO-2 ChemCam spectrum, spurious Na Rydberg lines must not be admitted (they previously detonated Na to 77-98 wt% vs certified 1.65 wt%). Directly protects composition accuracy against a catastrophic known failure.

BIC pruning and subset-NNLS checked against scipy.optimize.nnls oracle AND against constructed ground truth (selected elements == planted active set). Protects identification correctness of the active dual-backend path.

FISTA NNLS validated against scipy Lawson-Hanson oracle on residual norm, KKT conditions, non-negativity constraint, determinism — math-oracle correctness with correctly-reasoned tolerances for non-unique minimizers.

Gate/ownership/NaN tests protect identification accuracy (contaminated matches rejected, real lines kept, BHVO-2 Sn/Th FP cases). The two pinned tests REPRODUCE pre-fix buggy behavior on legacy paths — they fail if the legacy defect is ever fixed, i.e., they pin the bug, not the truth.

Shot-noise (Poisson sqrt(N)) uncertainty floor with analytic expected values; protects Boltzmann-plot weight honesty (over-confident Voigt sigma cannot over-weight a point). Disable-knob test is cheap config coverage.

CPU/JAX fit parity (slope/T/covariance/outlier rejection over 100 spectra) and finite-T recovery near 11604 K are keepers. The pinned test asserts use_jax defaults to False 'so existing callers are byte-for-byte unchanged' — back-compat default pin with zero users; parity tests already guarantee equivalence.

Hand-computed escape factors, Planck radiance round-trips, slab radiative-transfer recovery toward thin truth, published Völker & Gornushkin validity gate, numerical-integral oracle for Doppler COG escape factor; suspect lines never boosted (trust surface).

Explicitly independent oracles: hand-computed width-to-n_e conversion, known-Lorentzian recovery, forward-model round-trip at known n_e, MAD scatter oracle, literature-provenance gating, fallback warning preserved (trust surface).

Convergence honesty: non-mixing chains must NOT be reported CONVERGED (kills the fabricated r_hat=1.0/ess=N diagnostic), with ArviZ and brute-force autocorrelation oracles. Trust-surface protection of result trustworthiness.

test_compute_spectrum_vmap_safe is a keeper (vmap rows must match unbatched spectra — guards chain cross-contamination). The pins introspect a constructor kwarg and a signature default (max_tree_depth==8): tuned-value pins that fail on any deliberate retune; a runtime benchmark would protect the actual throughput goal.

Constructed truth (two elements with identical honest lines must get equal intercepts); asserts uncapped WLS misranks intercepts, the cap shrinks the spurious gap, and the effect is monotone in K. Directly protects composition accuracy against single-bright-line hijack.

Independent Olivero-Longbothum Voigt and Stark-law oracles, known-n_e recovery, plus trust-surface gates (pressure-balance fallback warning, degenerate-composition/positive-slope flags with converged=False, binary-alloy non-flagging). All goal-protective.

Trust-surface parity between the two live solve paths: the lax path may not green-light a keystone-collapsed composition or omit quality_metrics keys (previously reported converged=True with missing r_squared). Protects convergence honesty.

Planted slope/intercept recovery, Saha ion-to-neutral shift consistency, unweighted-fit property (validated Aguilera & Aragon SB-graph), intercept-to-closure identity recovering a planted composition, oxide molar-oxygen balance. Pure math/physics oracles.

Forward-models a known 50:50 Mg/Ca plasma, attenuates a doublet with physical escape factors, asserts the observable-gated correction reduces composition error to ~50:50 and never boosts unpaired lines (the deleted feedback-loop failure mode). Composition accuracy against planted truth.

Pure back-compat shim suite: legacy flat-path names must resolve after the bayesian.py->package split. With zero users no back-compat is owed; test_flat_and_package_paths_agree imports the same module twice and asserts identity (tautological). Any real consumer test covers the imports that matter. PURGE.

Stark gamma power-law/clamp/alpha=0 tests check the Griem formula against direct references (keep); kernel-vs-wrapper agreement guards the Bayesian model against divergent physics (keep). Pins: a source-text grep asserting forward.py never mentions an adapter name (migration archaeology), and a signature-default pin (chain_method=='vectorized').

cube_transform tests are analytic math oracles (uniform midpoint, log-uniform geometric mean, normal PPF) — keep. test_prior_config_defaults and test_noise_parameters_defaults pin arbitrary tuned defaults (T range (0.5,3.0), gain=1.0, readout=10.0) as exact values.

Entirely back-compat surface pins: alias identity (NumPyroNUTSSampler is MCMCSampler), legacy run() keyword-set preservation, Protocol duck-typing tautologies, frozen-dataclass shape. No assertion failing here would ever mean identification/composition accuracy or runtime got worse — only that the API was renamed.

None-routing and nonzero-estimate tests protect real fallback semantics of the multi-T prefilter (keep). The zero-estimate tests pin the post-fix 'honor T=0.0 K / ne=0.0' behavior — physically meaningless values whose handling never affects the goal; heavily coupled to deepcopy/fallback-mutation internals.

Mn/Na/K false-positive rejection on synthetic spectra and strict/lax scoping tests directly protect identification accuracy (goal-metric). The two named tests pin exact tuned thresholds (0.7/0.5) and 'byte-identical pre-PR' baseline via a private method — tuned-value/legacy pins.

Cheap registry-wiring tests: documented keys resolve, unknown name raises KeyError, self-absorption/two-region entries are distinct callables (catches mis-wired flags). test_forward_model_fn_is_protocol is trivially weak but harmless.

Structural conformance across all five identifiers: identify(wavelength, intensity) signature drift would break the unified benchmark predictor builders. Cheap, catches real internal interop breakage.

lax.while_loop fast path vs Python reference parity (rtol 1e-5) across all six closure modes on analytic Saha-Boltzmann fixtures, Σc=1 conservation under vmap, and zero-DB-queries-in-loop efficiency guard. Protects that the efficiency path computes identical compositions.

Core is physics-truth: Δq = ln E(λ) analytic intercept-bias oracle, forward/inverse round trip, coverage hard-errors (trust surface); loader tests are utility. Pins: object-identity (`out is intensity`) for the None default, and citation-string content of an unimplemented-stub NotImplementedError.

JAX solver vs numpy solver composition parity on analytic Boltzmann/Saha fixtures (Aalto-style T=8000K), plus recovery of known T and concentration from noiseless data. Protects composition accuracy of the accelerated path.

Calibration helpers against analytic oracles (fits recover known polynomial coefficients, BIC edge cases, dedupe), CCD seam detection on realistic axes, and the coverage gate guarding the real ChemCam VNIR red-end extrapolation failure mode. Cheap and goal-protective.

Mostly physics-truth: Doppler σ = sqrt(kT/mc²) Maxwell std vs open-coded buggy form, Σ C_s = 1 simplex closure, cooling-trail (1+t/t0)^exp analytic integration. The named test is a tautology — it calls doppler_sigma_jax twice and compares it to itself, never touching the generator.

Nyquist ≥3 px/FWHM validate() guard (literature-standard sampling criterion, boundary case included) is physics-truth protecting manifold spectral fidelity. The two named tests pin the arbitrary exact default 18432 — any Nyquist-safe value would do and validate() already enforces the real constraint.

Verifies confusion-matrix aggregation (TP/FP/FN, precision/recall/F1, over-prediction rates) against a hand-computed oracle — protects integrity of identification-accuracy reporting that goal decisions are based on. Markdown-header asserts are minor.

Failure-mode attribution tooling verified against a hand-built fixture (each mode fires exactly where triggered, cross-workflow rollup, empty inputs). Cheap; protects diagnostics used to debug identification failures.

Cluster telemetry script: JSONL loader window filtering, malformed-line skipping, percentile interpolation math, sparkline, CLI exit codes. Generic utility tests that catch real breakage and cost nothing; not goal physics but harmless keepers.

Server framing/queue/overload/error-envelope behavior with fake runner (utility), plus an opt-in slow perf gate asserting ≥4x warm-vs-cold benchmark amortization — a genuine runtime goal-metric. Keep whole.
Wire-format round trips and FrameError rejection (zero-length, oversize-before-allocation, short body, bad JSON). Classic cheap I/O utility tests catching real breakage.

Vrabel2020 dataset loader round-trips on hermetic synthetic HDF5/xlsx fixtures plus real-data schema/label-alignment smoke when files present. Protects integrity of benchmark ground-truth data feeding goal metrics.

McWhirter LTE criterion validated against the documented formula (Cristoforetti 2010) with an independent in-test oracle for ΔE term-scheme convention and n_e_required; protects trustworthiness of LTE gating (non-LTE plasmas must fail).

Partition-function fallback ladder against exact isoelectronic physics (U(Na II)≈1 closed shell — the 15x Saha inflation audit case), g0 tier, and warn-once trust-surface for generic constants. External-truth values plus result-honesty warnings.

JAX vs NumPy Saha-Boltzmann numerical equivalence (partition functions, ionization balance, full solve_plasma) across the 6000-15000 K / 1e15-1e17 LIBS regime, plus a guard that the JAX kernel is actually on the call path (no silent numpy fallback).

JAX plasma-state wrapper preserves the numpy surface and exposes numerically identical jnp tensor views with consistent species ordering. Cheap wiring tests that catch real breakage in the manifold/forward-model input path.

Chunked forward kernel parity vs un-chunked reference across nstitch sweep, gradient parity, analytic overlap_and_add oracle, under-sized-overlap canary, NIST_PARITY rejection, line-mask semantics. Protects spectral correctness of the memory-efficiency path.

Main test rebuilds the reference via an independent Boltzmann n_upper computation and asserts SpectrumModel wrapper parity (physics-truth); manifold adapter smoke is fine. The named sentinel only asserts hasattr(BayesianForwardModel, '_compute_spectrum') — a structural pin of a private name.

vmap-batched forward model matches Python-loop reference to rtol 1e-5 over 16 plasma states, plus NIST_PARITY per-line sigma finite-output smoke. Protects spectral correctness of the batched manifold path.

Bulk is strong physics-truth: three-stage Saha + Debye-Hückel IPD kernel vs CPU oracle across the rs7e grid, hard physical pins (Ca III dominance), IPD level cutoff. TestBackCompat is shim territory: alias object-identity and pre-rs7e legacy-snapshot degrade behavior.

LDM broadening vs per-line Gaussian reference (integrated-intensity rtol 1e-4), O(dx_σ²) convergence law, vmap parity, edge clipping, zero-line inertness, plus a runtime speedup floor vs Voigt. Math correctness plus the efficiency rationale for the kernel.

Regression for the float-key bug that silently dropped ~98% of line populations: >95% of Fe lines must receive non-zero n_upper and the spectrum must be a dense forest, against the production DB. Directly protects forward-model physical completeness.

Slow memory benchmark: chunked (nstitch=4) peak-memory proxy must be ≤0.5x the un-chunked baseline, with a correctness parity gate first. Directly measures the computational-efficiency goal of the chunked kernel.

SpectrumModelJax vs SpectrumModel parity (Planck radiance, LEGACY, NIST_PARITY, Stark on/off) plus independent profile-shape oracles (FWHM and wing-flux fraction) proving apply_stark yields Voigt not Gaussian — the audit Family 1 physics regression.
Asserts default forward model includes Stark broadening (FWHM physically wider, Aragon-Aguilera grounding); regression here would revert templates to Doppler-only and degrade line identification.
Stark line-center shift verified against independent analytic oracle (d_ref*ne/1e17), linearity in n_e, end-to-end peak movement. Pure physics validation gate.

test_toggle_off_default_applies_t_factor checks the canonical T-power-law formula vs analytic oracle (keep). The two pinned tests reproduce pre-vjbh legacy behavior via an env toggle that exists only for ablation archaeology.
Basis-library build tooling: filename/loader regex coherence, dir-resolver priority, tiny end-to-end build with schema and normalization sanity, idempotence. Cheap, catches real tooling breakage.
Operational pause/resume mechanism for the post-merge benchmark dispatcher (external beefcake-swarm script, skipped when absent). Protects against accidental SLURM submissions; pure ops plumbing.
Env-var plumbing for the JAX persistent compile cache (setdefault semantics, cluster default). Supports runtime efficiency infrastructure; cheap config tests.

Shared-builder equality and knob round-trips protect BHVO-2 benchmark comparability (keep). Pins: exact tuned-default values, 'raw preset == legacy' bundle, gate-flags==defaults, and source-string matching against forbidden identifiers.
NFS benchmark-data mount smoke checks (skipped off-cluster) plus docs/test lockstep. Catches half-populated data mounts that would silently break goal benchmarks.
Sweep harness plumbing: arg parsing, per-iter seeding, manifest layout, error containment, iter-0==baseline determinism. Protects benchmark reproducibility; mocked at the workflow seam.
NIST accuracy-grade-to-uncertainty mapping (external NIST convention), DB grade coverage/validity bounds, and uncertainty wiring. Atomic-data truth feeding uncertainty propagation.

Bulk is ALIAS scoring correctness vs the published formula (CL product, erf P_SNR), FP-on-noise suppression, double-counting fixes — identification-accuracy behavior. Pins: exact tuned default threshold 0.02 and max_lines default 50.

Keepers: resonance-filter behavior, robust-T recovery on Vrabel/BHVO fixtures, adaptive R2-gate physics, validation. Pins: exact tuned default thresholds, byte-identical legacy estimator/gate modes, default-off/default-mode pins — benchmark is the real arbiter.
Saha solver convergence, Anderson==Picard fixed point, analytic single-element Saha check, vmap parity, plus >1.5x iteration speedup (efficiency). Physics and numerics correctness.
AtomicDatabase query/filter correctness, data structures, SQL-injection guard, Fe ionization potential sanity. Cheap DB-layer coverage that catches real breakage feeding all physics.
BasisIndex build/query/save-load round-trip, weighted-median math, error paths. Loose-range estimate sanity; protects manifold-inference machinery cheaply.
Per-element neighbor voting must recover the correct (T, ne) on a synthetic two-element library and never blend chemically distinct families — directly protects plasma-parameter estimation accuracy.

Voigt/Doppler line-shape physics (FWHM grows with T, sigma scales with wavelength, Voigt wings beat Gaussian), area normalization, Fe peak position, interpolation symmetry — plus loader utility. No pins.
Batch GPU forward model: batch-vs-sequential parity to 1e-12, temperature/density physical response, zero-concentration nulling, non-negativity, dimensional consistency.

Bayesian forward model vs physics oracles: Doppler sigma vs profiles oracle, Saha Ca III charge balance, Poisson/Cash likelihood oracle, McWhirter penalty smoothness, self-reversal, two-zone reduction; MCMC smoke. Legacy-default tests are valid API-equivalence checks.
Benchmark-workflow config grid and _empty_result helpers: required keys, distinct names, sane bounds, error-result structure. Cheap harness plumbing.
Benchmark dataset structures, metric math (RMSEP/MAE/bias/R-squared vs hand values), synthetic generator reproducibility, JSON/HDF5 round-trips. Measurement-integrity utility for the goal harness.

Aitchison/ILR composition-metric math: symmetry, triangle inequality, scale invariance, isometry, round-trips — analytic oracles for the goal's measuring stick — plus harness registration/report plumbing.

Temperature recovery from synthetic Boltzmann data, robust outlier rejection (sigma-clip/RANSAC/Huber) vs known T, y-value formula, multiplet aggregation invariance (singleton==ungrouped is a degenerate-case identity, not a legacy pin).
JAX batched WLS kernel vs numpy/polyfit reference and known-T recovery, masking semantics, MC-validated sigma_T, finite gradients, degenerate-det safety.

Pins tuned fitter defaults as exact values (outlier_sigma==2.5, max_iterations==10, huber_epsilon==1.2); remaining asserts are constructor-assignment tautologies and weak smoke already covered by test_boltzmann.py.
A_ki-uncertainty weighting must pull the fit toward the true slope by down-weighting a high-uncertainty outlier — correctness of weighted fitting against an analytic expectation.
WLS weighting convention (1/sigma^2, not the buggy 1/sigma^4) verified against closed-form normal-equation oracle; protects temperature (hence composition) correctness.
LRU cache semantics, TTL, eviction, key hashing, decorator behavior, global stats. Generic utility supporting query-cache efficiency; cheap and real.

NNLS prefilter contract on fakes: coefficient ranking, SNR gating, stage aggregation, k_min/k_max, force_include, multi-T union, input validation. Functional semantics of a mandatory pipeline stage, not threshold pins.
Oscillator strength from A_ki (f_ik = 1.499e-14 (g_k/g_i) lambda^2 A_ki), Boltzmann y-value formula, resonance auto-detection — physical conversion formulas plus light factory coverage.
CLI error handling, config parsing (scientific-notation strings), DB path resolution, doctor/version output. Cheap interface coverage.
Regression for a real CLI crash (format-code ValueError on YAML string ranges). Cheap; catches genuine breakage.

Closed-form ILR solver recovers known T and compositions from analytically constructed Boltzmann data, Saha mixed-stage handling, matrix/oxide closure math, simplex properties, loose cross-check vs iterative solver.
Closure equation vs hand-computed values: standard normalization (sum=1), matrix mode, oxide stoichiometry, abundance multipliers, plus degeneracy-flag trust surface.

Dark-element residual closure: missing-mass capture without inflating detected elements, ratio preservation, scale invariance under intensity rescaling, warning-honesty gating — conservation and invariance properties.
Helmert basis orthonormality, CLR/ILR round-trips, isometry (Aitchison distance), simplex validity, apply_ilr==standard for single pass — all analytic math oracles.
PLR coordinates vs closed-form Hron 2012 oracle, isometry, round-trip identities, ALR non-isometry contrast, zero-handling with sum-to-one conservation.

Keepers: gradient_check trust surface (vanishing softmax gradients), JAX-backend guards preventing silently wrong gradients, sum-to-one/zero-safety/validation. Pins: bit-identity to a function the adapter directly delegates to (tautological) and adapter-vs-ClosureEquation drift parity.

Keepers: comb identifier detects Fe/H on synthetic spectra, no FP on pure noise, baseline/correlation mechanics, edge cases. Pins: exact tuned defaults (min_correlation==0.12, max_lines==50) and the legacy full-coverage penalty value.
Pins tuned Tier-2 detection thresholds (Mn/Na/K) and exact CombIdentifier defaults (0.12, 2.0) on contrived inputs. Whether these thresholds help F1 is a benchmark question, not a unit invariant.

Pins the capped-denominator scoring formula (score 2/10 vs old 2/50) under hand-tuned parameters; explicit old-vs-new behavior archaeology. A benchmark-better scoring change would fail it without any recall regression.

Rust core verified against hand-computable oracles (known match counts, shift recovery, F1 components) and analytic partition limits (zero coeffs U=1, linear U=T) plus Python reference parity. Failing means the accelerated identification/partition math is wrong.
YAML/JSON config load/save round-trips and validation error paths. Cheap, catches real breakage in config handling.
Physical constants sanity and unit-conversion inverse relationships (eV<->J, K<->eV). Weak but protects unit correctness.

Keepers: Fe detection on synthetic spectra, noise-only no-false-detection, finite scores on sparse data, vector-mode semantics (goal-metric). Pins: the three named tests assert tuned default values (min_confidence==0.03, fwhm==0.05, max_lines==100) and attribute storage — tautological default pins.
process_spectrum is an explicit placeholder; tests pin its hardcoded dummy plasma parameters (T==12000 K, ne==1e17) — asserting a stub returns its stub values. Nothing goal- or physics-protecting.
Verifies the wrapper forwards CLI args to datagen_v2.py correctly. Cheap and catches real DB-generation arg breakage.

Recovers known Voigt centers/areas from synthetic spectra (analytic ground-truth oracles), including overlapping peaks and noise; peak grouping semantics. Two trivial dataclass tests ride along but are negligible.

Trust-surface: four-layer detection-coverage telemetry that explains why an element was missed (Si has DB lines but zero peak matches gets flagged). Protects diagnosability/honesty of identification results.

Pinned classes re-implement stick-breaking inline and test numpy/scipy Dirichlet — they never call cflibs code, so they protect nothing in the codebase. Keepers: PriorConfig preset semantics (geological alpha<1 etc.) and create_concentration_prior smoke tests.

Keepers: configure_gpu env-var behavior, _merge_results chain combination, SLURM script generation content. Pins: dataclass construct-and-assert tautologies and exact default values (num_warmup==500, target_accept_prob==0.8) — arbitrary tuned defaults pinned exactly.

Full forward->detect->identify->solve round trips with ground-truth T, ne, composition; asserts T recovery within tolerance and composition MAE <=0.05/0.08, including production-DB variants. Directly measures the project goal.
Echellogram extraction: mock calibration, save/load round trip, order extraction sanity, error paths. Cheap instrument-IO coverage.

Keepers: to_line_observations bridge semantics (skips interfered, deduplicates, uncertainty floor, uses theoretical wavelength) feeding the Boltzmann fit. Pins: named construct-and-assert dataclass tests; test_element_identification_result_consistency asserts a relationship the test itself builds — tautological.
Guards assert_benchmark_relevance in evolution tooling (evolved diffs must touch benchmark-exercised files). Cheap, catches real breakage of the evolution gate.
CSV/HDF5/JSON exporter round trips, NaN/inf handling, factory function, edge cases. Generic I/O utility tests that catch real breakage.
CLI arg validation, chunk mode produces non-zero spectra in HDF5, build-index creates artifacts. Cheap smoke for model-library tooling.

Protects the measurement instrument: grouped k-fold/LOOCV keep perturbation variants together (no leakage), bootstrap CI, McNemar, Friedman-Nemenyi correctness. Identifier changes are benchmark-gated, so this stack's integrity is goal-critical.

Keepers: consensus voting semantics with analytic mini-oracles (2-of-3 keeps Mg, union vs unanimous, weighted voting), constructor validation. Pins: the DefaultPreservation tests exist only to assert pre-existing HybridIdentifier behavior stayed byte-identical — legacy-contract pins.

Coarse-to-fine inverter smoke tests with mock manifold: invert runs, real L-BFGS optimization actually executes (no silent fallback), edge cases. Assertions are validity/positivity, not accuracy, but catch real solver-path breakage cheaply.
Subprocess import-safety regression tests: optional JAX/Bayesian stacks must not break imports; lazy exports resolve. Catches real breakage that would take down the whole library.

FWHM=2.355*sigma conversions, sigma=lambda/R scaling in resolving-power mode, convolution preserves integral (flux conservation), non-uniform-grid error. Mathematical/physical correctness of the instrument model.
Forward-model workflow smoke tests (config->spectrum, multi-species, T/ne scans produce differing spectra). Sanity-level asserts; cheap integration coverage of the forward pipeline.
Full identify->to_line_observations->Boltzmann-fit pipeline for all three identifiers on the same spectrum, plus golden-spectrum round trip. Directly exercises identification accuracy end to end.
Spectrum load/save round trips, alternative column names, error paths. Generic I/O utility.

AST lint enforcing that only a hardcoded carve-out list may use literal 'try: import jax' and kernels.py must not import host.py. Pure architectural-conformance pin (ADR-0001/T1-1 archaeology); failing never indicates the goal got worse.

JointOptimizer recovers true T/ne/concentrations, softmax simplex invariant, multi-start escapes local minima, profile likelihood, full-Jacobian sigma_c validated against Monte Carlo. Directly measures composition-inference accuracy and uncertainty honesty.
Joint optimizer recovers true parameters on round-trip spectra, convergence, simplex guarantee, uncertainty estimates — accuracy comparison addressing acceptance criteria of the joint solver.

Asserts kernels.py module layout exists per ADR and that host modules re-export private kernel symbols 'for back-compat with existing callers'. Module-layout and shim re-export pins; no physics or goal protection.
detect_line_observations matches synthetic peaks to known Fe lines (371.99/373.49 nm) within tolerance and flags resonance lines — directly measures line-identification correctness.

Keepers: selection improves Boltzmann fit quality, auto-selection prefers high SNR/avoids blends, rejection/warning trust surface, crowded-spectra robustness (goal-metric). Pins: exact tuned default thresholds, heuristic scoring/isolation formula echoes (test re-derives the same formula), dataclass tautologies.
Logging setup, levels, format, logger hierarchy. Generic utility.
McWhirter criterion against the analytic formula 1.6e12*sqrt(T)*dE^3, cubic dE scaling, temporal equilibration check, Cristoforetti term-scheme dE convention, plus LTE warning trust surface.
ManifoldConfig validation/loading, HDF5/Zarr loader nearest-spectrum search, context manager, empty-manifold rejection. Infrastructure coverage for manifold inference path.

broadening_mode config plumbing (defaults, YAML parsing, invalid-value rejection) and generator dispatch between Voigt and LDM paths. Misrouting would silently apply wrong broadening, so dispatch checks earn their keep.
JAX physics kernels vs NumPy reference; Doppler sqrt(T/m) scaling laws, Stark density scaling, Voigt reduces to Gaussian/Lorentzian limits, vmap correctness. Analytic limiting-case oracles.

Keepers: ps-regime stoichiometric identity (physics, Russo 2002), uncalibrated-defaults warnings (trust surface), classification/renormalization/uncertainty propagation behavior. Pins: the named tests reproduce 'historical empirical factors exactly' (C==0.85 etc.) — self-declared uncalibrated generic defaults pinned as exact legacy values.
BIC pruning removes spurious elements while keeping true ones (identification accuracy on synthetic mixtures); Boltzmann-consistency filter passes physical/rejects random data; BIC math properties.
Partition functions, ionization fractions, and spectral output validated against NIST ASD reference data; direct-sum vs polynomial self-consistency. Canonical external-truth tests.

Keepers: fail-fast guard preventing silent float32 FISTA (~95% coefficient error) and configure/round-trip behavior — trust surface. Pin: the named purity canary asserts a helper does not touch jax.config — bead-archaeology shape pin; failing only means the side-effect seam moved.

SAM angles verified against analytic geometry (0/45/90/180 degrees, scale invariance, symmetry), MAD detection of planted outliers, realistic shot-to-shot and plasma-failure scenarios. Math-oracle correctness of preprocessing that guards data quality.
Polynomial partition function analytic checks, NIST reference coverage/physical bounds/monotonicity, polynomial-fit accuracy at key temperatures, solver integration and fallback.

Extrapolation guards vs direct-sum truth (Ca I no 560x explosion, Nb I floored at g0), in-range values unchanged, JAX twin matches NumPy; 'legacy' no-kwargs test actually verifies the analytic exp(sum a_n (ln T)^n) formula by hand.

Stored partition polynomial vs full direct-sum over NIST energy levels and Barklem & Collet 2016 Fe I reference; coverage/ground-state/finiteness gates on the production DB. External-truth anchored, replaces an earlier tautology.

Core tests are direct-sum parity, g0 floor, T-clamp, CPU/JAX adapter agreement (physics-truth). The two named tests pin the caching mechanism itself (object identity `s1 is s2`, fit call-count==1) — a valid refactor of the cache would fail them with no goal impact.

Gates every U(T) consumer path (CPU scalar, manifold/JAX snapshot, Bayesian arrays) against the direct-sum reference over DB energy levels; explicitly the gate that would have caught the 40-60%-low PF-1..PF-4 defect.

Generic in-house PCA utility: mathematical properties (variance decreasing, reconstruction, denoising reduces RMSE vs clean signal), NumPy/JAX backend agreement, error handling. Cheap, catches real breakage.
Tightened reconstruction tolerances (machine-precision round-trip on low-rank data) — analytic property of PCA, added because the original rtol=0.15 couldn't catch inverse-transform regressions.

ChemCam/SuperCam parser, cache, corpus and validation-schema mapping against checked-in fixtures; supplies ground truth for real-data validation. I/O and metadata correctness, cheap, real breakage detection.

Forward-model invariants: non-negative finite intensity, Boltzmann line-ratio monotonicity with T, self-absorption path-length bounds I(2L)<=2I(L), Saha fraction sum-to-one and Le Chatelier trends, eV/K unit consistency.

End-to-end: synthetic Fe/Cu spectrum with known composition -> detection -> ALIAS identification -> iterative solve; asserts recovered concentrations within 0.05 of ground truth and correct element set. Directly measures identification + composition accuracy.

Saha conservation, 3-stage coupling vs closed-form n_I = n_tot/(1+S1+S1*S2), Debye-Hückel IPD against independent Gaussian-CGS oracle, IPD-consistent partition cutoff with hand-computed Boltzmann sums, composition conversion math.
JAX backend selection/fallback (Darwin forces CPU, missing-GPU graceful fallback, x64 enabled, warning honesty). Cheap config-layer tests that catch real environment breakage.

Baseline (median/SNIP/ALS), noise estimation, and peak detection verified against synthetic spectra with known baselines/peaks/noise sigma. Functional signal-processing correctness underpinning detection; not pins.

Weak-peak sensitivity and AUTO-selector tests are functional keepers; the four dispatch tests guard a real PR #114 silent-rewiring bug class. The named test pins the tuned default (MEDIAN) as an exact value — a deliberate, benchmarked default change would fail it without any goal regression.

Gaussian/Lorentzian integrals = amplitude, Voigt limiting cases, Weideman Faddeeva vs scipy.wofz to 1e-6, Doppler width physics, JAX gradient finiteness across LIBS conditions. Analytic and external oracles.

voigt_spectrum_jax vs scipy.special.wofz reference (1e-6 across 100-case sweep), unit normalization, Gaussian/Lorentzian limits, gradient finiteness, float64 — forward-model line-shape correctness against an external oracle.

Chi-squared math, closure-residual correctness, and warning emission (trust surface) are keepers. test_default_thresholds pins arbitrary tuned quality thresholds (0.95/0.90/0.80, 0.01/0.05/0.10) as exact values; test_dataclass_creation is tautological field-storage.

Emissivity linear in population, area-preserving broadening (wider sigma -> lower peak), per-line == scalar broadening equivalence, resolving-power sigma formula, Doppler T-scaling, NumPy/JAX path agreement.

Inlined kernels.py partition evaluator must equal the canonical ln-basis implementation (rtol 1e-12) plus order-of-magnitude physical sanity; the duplicate is live forward-model code and the guarded drift was an 18-orders-of-magnitude physics bug (CF-LIBS-improved-ddwh).

Certified CRM compositions (BHVO-2, BIR-1, NIST SRM 612) checked against GeoReM/NIST published oxide values via stoichiometric conversion, mass balance, and trace/minor strata rules — external truth for composition-accuracy benchmarks.

Enforces an 800-LOC-per-file ceiling on bayesian/*.py (ADR/spec acceptance criterion). Pure code-organization policing; failing can never indicate identification/composition accuracy or runtime got worse.
Result-table formatting mixin and CI/quantile helpers (correct 68/95% percentile levels vs np.percentile, NaN handling for <2 samples). Cheap output-layer tests that catch real breakage.

Forward->invert round-trip validation against known T/ne/concentrations including noise and self-consistent n_e recovery (T within 15%, n_e within 50%); plus generator/noise-model reproducibility supporting the validator. Directly measures composition/parameter accuracy.

f(tau)=(1-exp(-tau))/tau vs published tabulated values, curve-of-growth regimes (linear slope~1, saturation~0), doublet-ratio recovery of injected tau, optical-depth scaling laws (linear in density, Doppler T-scaling), Si resonance escape factors. A few trivial dataclass tests, but overwhelmingly literature/analytic-oracle physics.
SBATCH script generation, array/dependency directives, env-var name validation, dry-run workflow. HPC infrastructure correctness without a cluster; cheap and catches real breakage.

Closure-map mathematics: sum-to-one (conservation), positivity, inverse round-trip, analytical Jacobian vs autodiff, rank D-1, extreme-value stability, batch consistency — analytic oracles for the composition closure used in solving.

IterativeCFLIBSSolver recovers known T/composition from analytically constructed Boltzmann data; Saha correction verified against the closed-form transform; pressure-balance n_e vs hand-iterated equilibrium; degenerate-fit gate reports non-converged (trust surface).

Detection accuracy on synthetic spectra (Fe detected/dominant, mixtures, noise rejection) and gate monotonicity are goal keepers. The named tests pin tuned defaults as exact values via inspect.signature (DETECTION_SNR==4.0, min_relative_coeff==0.0) and a private attribute — re-tuning after benchmarking fails them with no goal signal.

L-BFGS-B refinement recovers true T within 20% and correct Fe>Cr ordering on synthetic basis-library spectra; convergence on clean data, chi2_red sanity, residual non-increase. Directly measures composition/parameter accuracy of the refiner.

Closure constraint sum(C)=1 enforced with exposed residual, composition recovery against an optimizer-independent oracle (Fe=0.7/Ni=0.3), and amplitude-composition decoupling under 1e3 intensity rescale — conservation-law and invariance gates.

Coverage backfill with a fake basis library: empty/unknown-element paths, bounds clipping, resampling, finite chi2, non-negative residual. Cheap robustness tests; one tautological dataclass check is harmless.

Path-length linear scaling, temperature dependence, non-negativity, invalid-plasma rejection, and mode dispatch checks are keepers. The named test pins 'default == LEGACY mode, identical to old behavior' — a deliberate default-mode improvement fails it with no goal regression (classic legacy-contract pin).

Stark FWHM/HWHM scaling laws with n_e and T, shift scaling, Konjević-anchored convention tests (stored FWHM at reference conditions, Al I/Ca II/Fe II anchors) that killed the x20 inflation bug, JAX/NumPy agreement.

Production DB stark_w for five anchor lines vs published STARK-B/Konjević 2002 widths within 20%, coverage gates (95% stark_w, 80% vdW/self), and provenance-tag integrity. External literature truth on shipped atomic data.
get_wavelength_tolerance: quadrature sqrt(inst^2 + stark^2) analytic check plus None/zero/custom fallback handling. Small, cheap matching-tolerance utility tests.

Real-time pipeline: ring-buffer semantics and thread safety, latency-monitor statistics, fast/standard analyzers, edge-model quantization, end-to-end streaming flow with mocked DB. Runtime infrastructure correctness, catches real breakage.

Benchmark-corpus helpers: mass->number fraction normalization, monotonic wavelength distortion with correct mean shift, factorial perturbation counts, recipe filtering. Cheap support for the goal-metric corpus machinery.

Benchmark scoring helpers: confusion counts, precision/recall/F1 arithmetic, failed-row handling, perturbation-axis grouping, identifier-runner suite composition. Correctness of the goal-measurement machinery itself.

Temporal module: evolution-model decay trends, LTE validity, gate-timing optimization sanity, optical-depth time decay, and joint multi-gate fits that recover constant composition with lower uncertainty than per-gate (goal-relevant keepers). No purge-worthy pins found.

TwoRegionPlasma validation and unphysical-gradient warning (trust surface) are keepers. The named test pins the hard-coded stub T_corona == 0.8*T_K ('in our implementation') — pure implementation-pin of an arbitrary factor; any real two-region physics would break it.

Correlation-aware propagation: covariance preserved through Boltzmann->T->closure, sum-to-one under closure, n_e uncertainty budget enlarges sigma_C without moving point estimates, MC statistics, Poisson low-count unbiasedness (Gaussian-floor bias regression). Statistical truth + trust surface.
Unit conversions (K/eV/C, cm^-3/m^-3, nm/m/wavenumber) with round-trips and known values (~0.86 eV, ~20000 cm^-1) — exactly the unit-conversion truth class.

USGS certified geostandard compositions (BHVO-2 etc.) verified via stoichiometric oxide->element factors against published wt% values, plus spectrum loading and renormalization logic feeding the accuracy benchmarks.

Manifold FAISS index: embed/search exact-match, save/load round-trip, and IVF under-training guards (n_lists reduction / flat fallback with logged warning) preventing silently degenerate nearest-neighbor inference. Infrastructure for fast inference.
Optional-dependency export gating, HTML escaping of user input, and PosteriorViewer input validation. Cheap presentation-layer tests catching real breakage.

Empty tombstone: docstring-only module documenting that the legacy CDSBPlotter tests were removed with the class; coverage now lives in test_self_absorption.py. Zero assertions, pure deleted-feature remnant — delete the file.
